title: TicTacToe
description:
We want to create a program to check the result of a tic tac toe game. A tic tac toe board is a 3x3 grid. Each position can contain either X or O. The game finishes with a winner when a player creates a straight line of 3 equal symbols. The next 3 boards show finished games with a winner. The empty positions are represented using dots. 

X.X     OX.    .X.
OOO     .O.    .X.
...     X.O    .XO

In contrast, these 3 boards have not finished with a winner.

OXO    X..    ...
XXO    O.O    .X.
OOX    .XX    ..O
input: The test case consists of 3 lines. Each one with 3 characters (dot, O or X). Note that we are using the letter “O” not the digit zero.
output: For each test case, write YES if the board finished with a winner or NO if there is no winner.
source: Olympiad, All-Ireland Programming Olympiad, 2015 AIPO National Finals - Junior, jaehoo1, lyzqm
